title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs & embedders.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI wrapper (Rust) for interactive Ollama chats with syntax highlighting & history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server & models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Kotlin & Scala friendly) with synchronous & async APIs.

title: ollama-chatbot (discord)
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented-Generation starter: uses Ollama + Chroma to chat with PDFs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai: Ollama models as generators & rankers in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container in CI pipelines for integration tests.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector invoking Ollama models from BPMN service tasks (no external SaaS needed).

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community node for n8n workflow automation: chat, generate, embed steps using local Ollama.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit template repo to build and share chat apps backed by any Ollama model in minutes.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to declaratively manage Ollama models (pull/delete) on remote hosts.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package providing a fluent facade and Artisan commands for chatting with Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client crate with tokio, serde and native TLS; mirrors official Python SDK surface.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with note” command using any local Ollama model.
